title: Buster Kitchen Plughole Unblocker 150g, Pack of 3 - Kitchen Drains & Sinks Unblocker, Blasts Fat & Food Debris – Fast Acting Plughole Unclogger, Clears Blockages & Slow-Draining Water
features: KITCHEN SINK UNBLOCKER - Buster Kitchen Plughole Unblocker is the one-shot drain unblocker specially designed to target food and fat build-up in kitchen drains and sinks fast

BLASTS FAT & FOOD - Buster's heavy-duty kitchen drain cleaner tackles the build-up of fat and food debris – these are the common plughole nasties that, if not treated regularly, can cause the dreaded kitchen plug blockage
STOP SLOW DRAINING WATER & BLOCKAGES - Whether it’s a full blockage or slow draining water, Buster’s fast-acting sink unblocker targets build-up and melts fat and grease to keep water flowing freely

MIGHTY ONE-SHOT TREATMENT - Buster’s fast and effective unique formulation drops straight to the blockage and works in 20 minutes (for best results leave overnight), ready to flush away blockages inside your kitchen sink and pipes

YOUR PLUGHOLE EXPERTS - For over 30 years we’ve worked obsessively to make plughole care products that are effective and simply get the job done, from clearing and preventing blockages to cleaning and sanitising
description: Product Description Buster Kitchen Plughole Unblocker is the one-shot plughole unclogger specially designed to target food and fat build-up in kitchen drains and sinks fast. Slow draining water in the kitchen sink is usually caused by the gradual build-up of fat and food debris. If not treated regularly, this build up will eventually harden to cause that dreaded kitchen drain blockage. Buster Kitchen Plughole Unblocker’s Mighty One Shot™ powder targets food and fat build up and foams up to clean the entire pipe. Whether it’s a full blockage or slow draining water, Buster gets to work quickly to leave kitchen drain free flowing again. It’s no wonder, plugholes love Buster™. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: >30% Oxygen-Based Bleaching Agents, <5% Perfumes (Benzyl Benzoate, Linalool) Directions To use Buster Kitchen Plughole Unblocker, follow these steps: 1- Remove the plughole strainer (if present). 2 - Pour the entire bottle of granules directly down the plughole. 3 - Leave to work for 15-20 minutes. 4 - Flush through with lots of cold water. NB - If drain is completely blocked, scoop out as much water as possible within the sink before use. Safety Warning Keep the bottle locked upright in a dry, cool and well-ventilated place with cap securely closed. Suitable for use on all pipes and septic systems, but take care on gold plated fittings, worn or damaged enamel, chrome. Not suitable for use in bathrooms and waste disposal units. Do not leave overnight. Never allow any liquids into the bottle even when empty. Manufacturer Contact Information Challs International Ltd., PO Box 7, Ipswich, IP7 6DH. IE: 1 Drummartin Road, Dundrum, Dublin 14, D14 C3YO. See more
